<!-- source-snippet repo="splice-wallet-kernel" path="docs/wallet-integration-guide/examples/snippets/create-key-pair.ts" commit="fd1b4b3e5fd5daad189225cb2b585a0ab3b5f67f" snippet="docs/wallet-integration-guide/examples/snippets/create-key-pair" location="fullFile" -->
```typescript
  import { SDK, localNetStaticConfig } from '@canton-network/wallet-sdk'

  export default async function () {
      const sdk = await SDK.create({
          auth: global.TOKEN_PROVIDER_CONFIG_DEFAULT,
          ledgerClientUrl: localNetStaticConfig.LOCALNET_APP_USER_LEDGER_URL,
      })
      sdk.keys.generate()
  }

```
